subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: By the Justice and judgment of God those who commit evil suffer and are punished for it... But mercy is by far the greatest of the divine attributes and owing to this great mercy of God those who die in their sins are not left without the possibility of attaining to Life.
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @justice and mercy, @soul; spirit after death
